headline: Church & Dwight Reports Q1 2026 Results
summary: EWING, N.J., May 01, 2026--Church & Dwight Co., Inc. (NYSE: CHD) today announced that the Company exceeded its first quarter outlook with stronger than expected sales, gross margin expansion, earnings growth and continued market share gains across its global portfolio. Reflecting our 2025 strategic portfolio actions, first quarter 2026 net sales increased 0.2% to $1,469.3 million, exceeding the Company’s first quarter outlook of a 1% decline.
